pages.text: The $(item)Nether Lava Skyseed$() — an $(item)Aquatic Skyseed$(), basalt and a $(item)bucket of lava$() (returned empty). A full-size $(bold)lava lagoon$() — and the overworld's only lava island, if you throw it topside.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.

Tier-2 of the Lava Lagoon: a $(bold)full-size$() basalt island built around a contained $(item)lava$() lake, with magma-block shores, a wandering pack of $(item)Striders$() and a $(item)Magma Cube$() or two. The molten cousin of the Aquatic isle.

$(bold)Yields$()$(br)Striders for lava travel (saddle one and steer with a $(item)warped fungus on a stick$()), magma cream from the cubes, and a little nether quartz and gold in the body. The lake is a ready-made smelter and an obsidian source — bring a bucket of water.

$(bold)Topside, too$()$(br)The overworld has no lava island of its own, so this seed grows a $(bold)full one$() there as well: a stone-bodied volcanic isle with the same lava lake — Striders and all. Crafted from an $(item)Aquatic Skyseed$(), basalt and a bucket of lava (you keep the bucket).
